emails.subject: Re: Cornhusker Contact Information
emails.body: Re: Cornhusker Contact Information I still need the contact name, phone number and address for the ENA contact and a name for the the letter for them to contact with questions. These were questions 3 and 4 on the original list from Sandi. Thanks. Bob. Daren J Farmer 09/29/2000 09:36 AM
